name: AWS Security Hub Standards
description: AWS Security Hub automated security standards: AWS Foundational Security Best Practices (FSBP), CIS AWS Foundations Benchmark, PCI DSS, and NIST SP 800-53 Rev 5. Each standard maps to automated checks against AWS resources.
relationToCloudSecurity: Direct AWS-native compliance scoring. Heavily used in AWS-resident cloud security programs.
relationToAISecurity: Some controls apply to AI/ML services (e.g., S3 encryption for training data).
